_meta.title: Arrivio hotel Pacht (lease) deduction model
_meta.purpose: Estimate the monthly Pacht (net cold lease) for a hotel when no real listing exists, as a RANGE. Real LISTED Pacht always overrides this.
_meta.unit: EUR per month, Nettokaltmiete / Pacht (net cold, excl. Nebenkosten & VAT)
_meta.output: a low–high range; never a single false-precision number
_meta.note: Anchored to real ahgzimmo Pacht listings. Bands kept realistic (real Pacht runs cheaper than value x yield).

segment.definition: Individualhotellerie (independent/family hotels) + small chains. ~86.6% of German hotels by count, ~53% of room capacity; chains ~65-70% of revenue. Typically <100 rooms.
segment.source: IHA Hotelmarkt Deutschland (via hotelbau.de, 2018 structure); user brief 2026-06-22
segment.target_filter: exclude large chains (brand/operator) BUT keep small chains; core profile <100 rooms

abloese_note: Many listings add an Ablöse (one-off inventory/goodwill buyout) ~EUR 60k-300k; hotels are often 'keine Ablöse'. Show separately, not part of Pacht.

tier_assignment.regional: other Kreisstädte / mid towns (20k-150k pop or a Kreisstadt)
tier_assignment.rural: small towns / villages / leisure areas (default when not metro/b_city/regional)

method: PRIMARY (2026): Pacht ≈ 15–25% of net revenue; revenue ≈ rooms × 365 × occupancy × ADR. Occupancy = real Destatis GENESIS bed-occupancy for the state; ADR modeled by category (1-2★ €72, 3★ €105, 4★ €135, 5★ €250). The per_room/per_m2 tier bands below are cross-checks and the rooms-unknown (per_m2) fallback. Always show real LISTED Pacht when the hotel matches a listing in properties.json.

revenue_rule.pacht_mal_acht: small owner-operated: annual net turnover ≈ 8× annual rent (rent ≈ 12.5% of revenue)

research_anchors_2026.name: Industry worked example: 100-room hotel @75% occ, €80 ADR
Market 2025: national ADR ~€117, occ ~68%, RevPAR ~€79; München RevPAR ~€96, Berlin ~€80
research_anchors_2026.source: Christie & Co DACH 2025; Engel & Völkers Hotelmarkt 2025

per_tier_research_bands_note: metro €450-900, b_city €300-550, regional €180-380, rural €120-300 per room/mo — synthesized from the 15-25% revenue rule + 2025 market data + real anchors (Wuppertal €185 = regional value end). No source publishes hotel Pacht banded by tier; medium confidence.

worked_examples.note: real listing here is 10000 -> within range, LISTED wins

observed.note: Median observed €/room/mo & €/m²/mo from LISTED ahgzimmo HOTEL leases (regional folded into rural server-side). LISTED always overrides the model.
